description: Style Note An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure your trousers, or act as a styling detail to jazz up your outfit. This canvas belt from lee is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Product Details Made of canvas for durability and style Metal loops to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Broad base to sit snug on the waist Brand logo embossed on a leather patch on the tail end of the belt Material and Care Canvas and leather Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Use a leather conditioner to protect the leather
